backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the attendance tracker app, defining attendance record and user profile data types, CRUD operations for records and profiles, and access-control enforcement via mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single implemented feature: updating the working-hour calculation logic to deduct 30 minutes for lunch on regular working days (noLeave), with references to affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of key frontend source files, describing the purpose and notable changes of App.tsx, Export.tsx, index.css, hoursCalculation.ts, and SmartSwipeOutPrediction.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module for the Office Attendance Tracker.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with five routes (Today, Dashboard, Leaves, Analytics, Export), wraps the app in AuthGuard, renders the ProfileSetup modal, and initializes notification reminders.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that shows a loading spinner during initialization, redirects unauthenticated users to the LoginScreen, and renders children when authenticated via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo, sync status, theme toggle, and user avatar dropdown, plus a bottom navigation bar linking to all five main routes.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login page displaying the app branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity sign-in button with loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog shown to first-time users for entering their display name, using a query to detect missing profiles and a mutation to save the new profile.
frontend/src/components/SmartSwipeOutPre: Displays a smart prediction card showing how many hours remain for the weekly target and the recommended swipe-out time, or a success message if the target is already met.
frontend/src/components/SyncStatusIndica: Renders a small status indicator icon and label reflecting the current sync state (synced, syncing, offline, or pending with a count).
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence via AuthClient, and status flags exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotificationRemind: Schedules daily browser notifications on weekdays reminding the user to swipe in at 10:00 and swipe out at 18:30, rescheduling automatically each day.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfflineSync.ts: Manages an offline queue of attendance records in localStorage, syncing them to the backend actor when connectivity is restored and exposing sync status and pending count.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations on attendance records and user profiles, using the actor from useActor and invalidating relevant caches on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light/dark theme state with localStorage persistence and system preference detection, applying the theme class to the document root immediately to prevent flash.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark mode color tokens (backgrounds, typography, status, chart, sidebar colors) plus reusable component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page that fetches weekly and monthly attendance records and renders bar charts (weekly by day, monthly by week) along with summary stats like average daily/weekly hours, highest, and lowest using Recharts.
frontend/src/pages/DailyEntry.tsx: Daily attendance entry form allowing users to select a date, input swipe-in/out times, breakfast toggle, and leave type, with offline sync support and a smart swipe-out prediction component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying weekly and monthly attendance summaries via stat cards, progress bars, and tabbed views, computing hours worked, targets, deficits, and on-track status from fetched records.
frontend/src/pages/Export.tsx: Export page that lets users select a date range (week, month, or all) and download attendance records as CSV or TSV/Excel files, building rows with hours, leave type, and breakfast data.
frontend/src/pages/Leaves.tsx: React page that displays a user's leave history, showing summary counts of full-day and half-day leaves along with a sorted list of individual leave records fetched via useGetAllRecords.
frontend/src/utils/hoursCalculation.ts: Pure utility module defining constants and functions for calculating daily/weekly working hours, including time parsing/formatting, work window clamping, leave adjustments, and lunch/breakfast deductions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, font families (Inter/Manrope), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the attendance tracker app's architecture, implemented features, working-hour calculation rules, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0 / project state version 5.
